untranslatable_reason: BARR pattern requires explicit trend line construction and multi-level resistance lines (warning line, sell line) positioned at specific lead-in height multiples. Available indicators lack trend line object, geometric line positioning, and the ability to measure 'bump height vs lead-in height ratio' dynamically. The pattern's core logic—price bumping 2× lead-in height above a trend line and touching escalating parallel resistance levels—cannot be accurately captured with standard technical indicators alone. Approximation used: overbought conditions (price_pos_20 > 0.8) with trend reversal signals, but this loses the geometric precision of the BARR pattern.
